series_metadata.series_description: In addition to the application form and payment, High School Equivalence (GED) applications may include, but are not limited to, age waivers, court orders, parental consent forms, guardianship documentation and official high school transcript documenting the previous 12 months of applicant's enrollment in high school diploma program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Two (2) years ; Electronic: Two (2) years
